en: To the extent Republicans have engaged with the notion that withholding food from people is a bad thing,
ko: 그래서 겉으로는 꽤 매력적이야. 광고를 하나 더 보여줄 필요는 없지만

en: they've tried to frame it as Democratic extremists holding people's benefits hostage.
The USDA website even hosted a banner this week reading,
ko: 방금 한 말을 다 요약하니까 어쨌든 보여줄게. 대단하거든.

en: we are approaching an inflection point for Senate Democrats.
They can continue to hold out for health care for illegal aliens and gender mutilation procedures,
or reopen the government so mothers, babies, and the most vulnerable among us can receive critical nutrition assistance.
ko: 앨, 전화했어? 여보 우리 이미 메디케어 있잖아. 왜 전화해야 해? 앨런 더 펠드만이

en: And J.D. Vance, business chucky, tried a similar line of attack.
ko: 우리 우편번호에서 월 보험료 제로인 메디케어 어드밴티지 플랜으로 추가 혜택을 받을 수 있대.

en: The Chuck Schumer AOC wing of the Democratic Party shut down the government because they said to us,
ko: 여보 추가 혜택이 무슨 말이야? 65세 되면 메디케어 가입하는 거잖아.

en: we will open the government, but only if you give billions of dollars of funding for health care for illegal aliens.
ko: 파트 C라고 하는 메디케어 어드밴티지에 대해 얘기하는 거야. 우리는

en: That's a ridiculous proposition. Look, I'm gonna say this once,
and then only a hundred more times after that.
ko: 파트 A와 B만 있고 파트 C는 없어. 잠깐.

en: Shut up, J.D. Vance, you rancid Pope killer.
Please, never forget, Pope Francis met J.D. Vance,
ko: 그래서 메디케어 가입자 모두가 파트 C가 있는 건 아니야?

en: and then literally died the next day.
Was that a coincidence? No way, look at the Pope's face there.
ko: 아니 그래서 전화해야 해. 메디케어 파트 A와 B에 없는 추가 혜택이 있는 플랜이 있을 수 있어.

en: He's clearly thinking, you know what, it's not worth it, I'm out.
ko: 우리한테 파트 C가 없거든. 파트 A와 B 전부에

en: There are so many things wrong with what J.D. Vance just said, not least the phrase, Chuck Schumer AOC wing
ko: 파트 C의 추가 혜택까지 포함하는 거야. 어떤 추가 혜택? 치과,

en: of the Democratic Party. What are you talking about?
ko: 시력, 청력 같은 추가 혜택이 있는 좋은 플랜이 있어요. 치과라고요?

en: In what universe did these two fall on the same part of the political spectrum?
AOC is a progressive, while Chuck Schumer spends most of his days talking to imaginary Republicans.
ko: 이건 사실 광고의 전반부만이야. 다 있어.

en: They are not the same.
ko: 아마추어 포르노 수준의 연기, 과격한 몸짓, 완전히 불필요한 깨진 결혼의 뉘앙스,

en: And it is worth explaining what this fight is really about,
because it isn't actually over whether to provide health care to the undocumented who are already barred from Medicaid
and the ACA exchanges. It mainly concerns subsidies for insurance premiums
ko: 고지도 좋아. 마치 뇌진탕 온 롭 라이너와

en: under the ACA, which are set to expire unless Congress extends them, which will result
ko: 뇌진탕 온 롭 라이너와 카페인 과다 에이미 세다리스의 자연스러운 연기에 속을까 봐 상기시켜야 하는 것처럼.

en: in dramatic price spikes for millions.
According to the Oregon Health Plan, here's how people's health insurance premiums
will be affected if the enhanced premium tax credits are allowed to expire.
A single person in Portland earning $35,000 a year
could go from paying just over $1,000 a year to paying $2,600.
And a married couple in Hermiston earning $95,000 a year
would go from paying $8,000 a year to more than $33,000.
Holy shit, that is ridiculous.
You don't usually expect to see prices rise that sharply on anything except for maybe streaming services.
But you know what? You know what? I'm told that in exactly one of those instances, it's actually totally fine.
It's normal, and it still constitutes a real bargain.
